firmOrder.title: Confirm firm order
firmOrder.desc: “{insurer}” will be selected as the final quotation and the request moves to issuance.

renewal.title: Start renewal
renewal.desc: A renewal request will be created for this policy, starting a new cycle.

approveClient.title: Approve client
approveClient.desc: The client will be compliance-approved and policies can be issued.

rejectClient.title: Reject client
rejectClient.desc: The client will be rejected and requests cannot proceed (reversible later).

startRfq.title: Start RFQ
startRfq.desc: A slip will be created to collect insurer quotations and the request moves to quoting.

issuePolicy.title: Issue policy
issuePolicy.desc: A policy will be issued from this awarded request and moved to production.

approveTechnical.title: Technical approval
approveTechnical.desc: The policy will be technically approved and move to financial approval.

approveFinance.title: Financial approval
approveFinance.desc: Financial approval auto-generates a journal voucher, debit note and tax invoice, and the policy becomes active.

claimStatus.title: Update claim status
claimStatus.desc: The claim status will change to “{status}”.

serviceStatus.title: Update request status
serviceStatus.desc: The service request status will change to “{status}”.

tenantSuspend.title: Suspend tenant
tenantSuspend.desc: Tenant “{name}” access to the platform will be suspended immediately.

tenantActivate.title: Activate tenant
tenantActivate.desc: Tenant “{name}” access to the platform will be restored.

runYaqeen.title: Confirm verification
runYaqeen.desc: A Yaqeen identity check will run and one paid operation will be deducted from your wallet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your priorities today — sorted by urgency
dashboard.renewalsDist: Policies due for renewal within 60 days

reports.title: Reports & analytics
reports.subtitle: Production, commissions, claims and regulator reports — live data

finance.title: Finance & accounting
finance.subtitle: Chart of accounts, ZATCA tax invoices, and fiduciary separation
finance.invoicesSub: Each invoice carries a Phase-1 compliant QR (TLV)

premiums.title: Premiums & collections
premiums.subtitle: Amounts due from clients via debit notes

compliance.title: Compliance & risk
compliance.subtitle: Client compliance status and PEP/sanctions risk distribution

integrations.title: Regulatory integrations
integrations.subtitle: Government connectors and their status — Sandbox in development

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Manage both corporate and individual clients
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, CR, ID or mobile…

verify.title: Confirm government verification
verify.desc: A “{provider}” check will run on the client's data, one operation will be deducted from the wallet, and the result linked to the client file.
verify.done: “{name}” verified via {provider} and linked to the file.
verify.missingId: Cannot verify: this client has no CR / national ID.

commissions.title: Commissions
commissions.subtitle: Track accrued, received and variance commissions

placeholder.title: Under construction
placeholder.body: This screen will be built in a later ROADMAP phase. The UI here is scaffolding only.

signup.title: Create your company account
signup.subtitle: Start a 14-day free trial — your platform is provisioned automatically
signup.passwordHint: At least 8 chars with an uppercase, lowercase and a digit

return.success: Payment received — your subscription is active

org.title: Org structure & departments
org.subtitle: Organize departments hierarchically and set each one's default role
org.empty: No departments yet — start by adding a top-level one
org.deleteConfirm: Delete this department? Its members and sub-departments will be detached.

staff.title: Staff
staff.subtitle: Manage employees and their permission matrix
staff.name: Name
staff.forbidden: You don't have staff management permission (settings).

requests.title: Requests
requests.subtitle: Insurance requests (RFQ) for clients
requests.empty: No requests yet — start a new request

policies.title: Policies
policies.subtitle: Issuance & approval cascade (technical → finance)
policies.empty: No policies yet — issue from an awarded request

verification.title: Government Verification
verification.subtitle: KYC/KYB via Yaqeen/Wathiq/Nafath/National Address + PEP/sanctions screening
verification.smartFill: Sandbox pull to smart-fill the form (Yaqeen)

claims.title: Claims
claims.subtitle: Claim lifecycle: received → submitted → settled → closed
claims.locked: Claims module is not enabled in your plan

renewals.title: Renewals
renewals.subtitle: Policies due for renewal within 60 days
renewals.empty: No policies due for renewal soon

underwriting.title: Underwriting
underwriting.noQuotations: No quotations yet — add insurer offers

hint.insurer: Name of the insurer submitting this quotation
hint.rate: Premium rate as a % of the sum insured — drives the net premium
hint.vat: Value-added tax (15%) on the net premium
hint.totalPremium: Total premium due from the client = net premium + VAT
hint.deductible: Amount the client bears on each claim before cover applies
hint.limit: Maximum insurer liability (the policy's cover ceiling)
hint.remarks: Free-text conditions, exclusions and add-ons — shown in the comparison sheet

requestForm.title: New insurance request
requestForm.subtitle: Pick a client and product to generate the right form for the insurance type
requestForm.selectProduct: Select a product to render its dynamic form

tenants.title: Tenant management
tenants.subtitle: Subscribed companies and their subscription status

plans.title: Plans & entitlements
plans.subtitle: Control the modules and limits available per plan

portal.subtitle: Track your policies, claims and account

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.subtitle: A quick look at your insurance, claims and account

statement.title: Statement of account
statement.subtitle: Debit notes, tax invoices and outstanding balance

documents.title: My documents
documents.subtitle: Your policies and documents — opened via a secure temporary link

hero.title: The Operating System for Insurance Brokerage
hero.titleEn: InsurTech SaaS Platform for Insurance Brokers
hero.subtitle: A multi-tenant SaaS platform that automates the entire insurance-brokerage workflow — from client and underwriting to policy issuance, finance, claims and reporting — with granular permissions and full Saudi compliance.

features.title: Everything a brokerage needs, in one platform
features.subtitle: Integrated modules covering the workflow end to end.

lifecycle.title: Full deal lifecycle
lifecycle.desc: Sales → pricing → production → service → claims → finance, with governed state machines and gates.

underwriting.title: Underwriting & RFQ
underwriting.desc: Request quotes, auto comparison sheet that picks the best offer, firm order in one click.

finance.title: Finance & e-invoicing
finance.desc: Balanced double-entry, 17-digit chart of accounts, and ZATCA Phase 2 invoices.

claims.title: Claims & client service
claims.desc: Full claims cycle, service requests and renewals with status tracking.

verification.title: Government verification
verification.desc: Yaqeen, Wathiq, Nafath, National Address and PEP screening — smart-fill and compliance.

multitenant.title: Multi-tenant & analytics
multitenant.desc: Strict per-firm data isolation, granular RBAC, and live analytics dashboards.

target.title: Built specifically for insurance brokers
target.desc: Replace scattered systems and spreadsheets with one operating system that runs every operation and keeps you regulator-ready.
target.p1: An independent portal per brokerage (tenant) with its own data, settings and plan.
target.p2: A client portal to track policies, claims, statements and documents.
target.p3: A super-admin console to manage plans, subscriptions and usage.
target.p4: Ready government integrations (ZATCA · Nafath · Yaqeen · Wathiq · Insurance Authority).

pricing.title: Plans that grow with your firm
pricing.subtitle: Subscribe monthly or yearly, and enable only the modules you need.

premium.name: Professional
premium.f2: Everything in Basic + claims and reports

cta.title: Ready to run your brokerage professionally?
cta.subtitle: Start today and move your operations onto one compliant operating system.
